Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/states 2>&1 | python -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
items = data if isinstance\(data, list\) else data.get\('items', data.get\('data', []\)\)
# Show states with state-specific schemes
for s in sorted\(items, key=lambda x: x.get\('scheme_count', 0\), reverse=True\)[:18]:
    name = s.get\('name', '?'\)
    count = s.get\('scheme_count', 0\)
    state_specific = count - 46
    label = f' \(+{state_specific} state\)' if state_specific > 0 else ''
    print\(f'{name}: {count} schemes{label}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Collage/sevanagpt/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import select, func
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker, create_async_engine
from app.config import settings
from app.models import Scheme, scheme_states

async def check\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\(settings.DATABASE_URL\)
    sf = async_sessionmaker\(engine, class_=AsyncSession\)
    async with sf\(\) as s:
        # Total myscheme schemes
        total = \(await s.execute\(select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.source=='myscheme'\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        print\(f'Total MyScheme schemes: {total}'\)
        
        # MyScheme schemes with NO state links
        linked = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(func.count\(func.distinct\(scheme_states.c.scheme_id\)\)\)
            .where\(scheme_states.c.scheme_id.in_\(select\(Scheme.id\).where\(Scheme.source=='myscheme'\)\)\)
        \)\).scalar\(\)
        print\(f'MyScheme schemes WITH state links: {linked}'\)
        print\(f'MyScheme schemes WITHOUT state links: {total - linked}'\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)

asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

async def sample\(\):

            'https://api.myscheme.gov.in/search/v6/schemes',
            params={'lang': 'en', 'q': '', 'keyword': '', 'sort': '', 'from': 0, 'size': 10},
            headers={
                'x-api-key': 'tYTy5eEhlu9rFjyxuCr7ra7ACp4dv1RH8gWuHTDc',
                'Origin': 'https://www.myscheme.gov.in',
            },
        \)
        data = resp.json\(\)
        for item in data['data']['hits']['items'][:10]:
            f = item.get\('fields', {}\)
            name = f.get\('schemeName', '?'\)[:60]
            states = f.get\('beneficiaryState', []\)
            level = f.get\('level', '?'\)
            print\(f'{name}'\)
            print\(f'  level={level}, beneficiaryState={states}'\)
            print\(\)

asyncio.run\(sample\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Collage/sevanagpt/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import select, func
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker, create_async_engine
from app.config import settings
from app.models import Scheme, scheme_states

async def check\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\(settings.DATABASE_URL\)
    sf = async_sessionmaker\(engine, class_=AsyncSession\)
    async with sf\(\) as s:
        # MyScheme: central vs state breakdown
        central = \(await s.execute\(select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.source=='myscheme', Scheme.level=='central'\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        state = \(await s.execute\(select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.source=='myscheme', Scheme.level=='state'\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        print\(f'MyScheme central schemes: {central}'\)
        print\(f'MyScheme state schemes: {state}'\)
        
        # How many central myscheme schemes have NO state links?
        central_ids = \(await s.execute\(select\(Scheme.id\).where\(Scheme.source=='myscheme', Scheme.level=='central'\)\)\).scalars\(\).all\(\)
        linked_central = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(func.count\(func.distinct\(scheme_states.c.scheme_id\)\)\)
            .where\(scheme_states.c.scheme_id.in_\(central_ids\)\)
        \)\).scalar\(\)
        print\(f'Central MyScheme with state links: {linked_central}'\)
        print\(f'Central MyScheme WITHOUT state links: {central - linked_central}'\)
        print\(\)
        print\('These {0} central schemes should be linked to ALL 36 states!'.format\(central - linked_central\)\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)

asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Collage/sevanagpt/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import select, func
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker, create_async_engine
from app.config import settings
from app.models import Scheme, State, scheme_states

async def backfill\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\(settings.DATABASE_URL\)
    sf = async_sessionmaker\(engine, class_=AsyncSession\)
    async with sf\(\) as s:
        # Get all states
        all_states = \(await s.execute\(select\(State\)\)\).scalars\(\).all\(\)
        all_state_ids = [st.id for st in all_states]
        print\(f'Total states: {len\(all_state_ids\)}'\)
        
        # Get central myscheme schemes with no state links
        central_ids = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(Scheme.id\).where\(Scheme.source=='myscheme', Scheme.level=='central'\)
        \)\).scalars\(\).all\(\)
        
        linked_ids = set\(\(await s.execute\(
            select\(func.distinct\(scheme_states.c.scheme_id\)\)
            .where\(scheme_states.c.scheme_id.in_\(central_ids\)\)
        \)\).scalars\(\).all\(\)\)
        
        unlinked = [sid for sid in central_ids if sid not in linked_ids]
        print\(f'Central schemes without state links: {len\(unlinked\)}'\)
        
        # Backfill: link each unlinked central scheme to ALL states
        count = 0
        for scheme_id in unlinked:
            for state_id in all_state_ids:
                await s.execute\(
                    scheme_states.insert\(\).values\(scheme_id=scheme_id, state_id=state_id\)
                \)
            count += 1
            if count % 100 == 0:
                await s.flush\(\)
                print\(f'  ... backfilled {count}/{len\(unlinked\)} schemes'\)
        
        await s.commit\(\)
        print\(f'Backfill complete: linked {count} central schemes to {len\(all_state_ids\)} states each'\)
        print\(f'Total new junction rows: {count * len\(all_state_ids\)}'\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)

asyncio.run\(backfill\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Collage/sevanagpt/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import select, func
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker, create_async_engine
from app.config import settings
from app.models import Scheme, scheme_states

async def check\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\(settings.DATABASE_URL\)
    sf = async_sessionmaker\(engine, class_=AsyncSession\)
    async with sf\(\) as s:
        # For Gujarat: break down central vs state
        from app.models import State
        guj = \(await s.execute\(select\(State\).where\(State.name=='Gujarat'\)\)\).scalar_one\(\)
        
        guj_scheme_ids = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(scheme_states.c.scheme_id\).where\(scheme_states.c.state_id==guj.id\)
        \)\).scalars\(\).all\(\)
        
        central = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.id.in_\(guj_scheme_ids\), Scheme.level=='central'\)
        \)\).scalar\(\)
        state = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.id.in_\(guj_scheme_ids\), Scheme.level=='state'\)
        \)\).scalar\(\)
        
        print\(f'Gujarat breakdown:'\)
        print\(f'  Central \(applies to all states\): {central}'\)
        print\(f'  State-specific \(Gujarat only\): {state}'\)
        print\(f'  Total: {central + state}'\)
        
        # Compare with Ladakh \(lowest\)
        lad = \(await s.execute\(select\(State\).where\(State.name=='Ladakh'\)\)\).scalar_one\(\)
        lad_scheme_ids = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(scheme_states.c.scheme_id\).where\(scheme_states.c.state_id==lad.id\)
        \)\).scalars\(\).all\(\)
        central_l = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.id.in_\(lad_scheme_ids\), Scheme.level=='central'\)
        \)\).scalar\(\)
        state_l = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.id.in_\(lad_scheme_ids\), Scheme.level=='state'\)
        \)\).scalar\(\)
        print\(f'\\\\nLadakh breakdown:'\)
        print\(f'  Central \(applies to all states\): {central_l}'\)
        print\(f'  State-specific \(Ladakh only\): {state_l}'\)
        print\(f'  Total: {central_l + state_l}'\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)

asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Collage/sevanagpt/backend && source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import select, func
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, async_sessionmaker, create_async_engine
from app.config import settings
from app.models import Scheme

async def count\(\):
    engine = create_async_engine\(settings.DATABASE_URL\)
    sf = async_sessionmaker\(engine, class_=AsyncSession\)
    async with sf\(\) as s:
        total = \(await s.execute\(select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        central = \(await s.execute\(select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.level=='central'\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        state = \(await s.execute\(select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.level=='state'\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        
        # By source
        sources = \(await s.execute\(
            select\(Scheme.source, func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).group_by\(Scheme.source\).order_by\(func.count\(Scheme.id\).desc\(\)\)
        \)\).all\(\)
        
        print\(f'Total schemes: {total}'\)
        print\(f'  Central: {central}'\)
        print\(f'  State:   {state}'\)
        print\(\)
        print\('By source:'\)
        for src, cnt in sources:
            print\(f'  {src or \\"\(none\)\\"}: {cnt}'\)
    await engine.dispose\(\)

asyncio.run\(count\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio
from app.database import async_session
from sqlalchemy import select, func
from app.models import Scheme, TranslationCache

async def check\(\):
    async with async_session\(\) as db:
        total = \(await db.execute\(select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        active = \(await db.execute\(select\(func.count\(Scheme.id\)\).where\(Scheme.status == 'active'\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        cached = \(await db.execute\(select\(func.count\(TranslationCache.id\)\)\)\).scalar\(\)
        print\(f'Schemes: {total} total, {active} active'\)
        print\(f'Translation cache: {cached} entries'\)

asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
